creator: lev@serebryakov.spb.ru
text:
Hello, freebsd-gnats-submit! How are you?

  I've tried to compile x11-toolkits/qt23 (2.3.1_1) on other computer
  with FreeBSD 4.2 with same result (moc2 coredumped on first call).
  Hardware is perfect in both cases -- uptime more than 100 days, many
  ports was compiled many times, etc.

               Lev Serebryakov
